Sōshūhen

Part I of the manga was re-released as eight sōshūhen, called the Naruto Complete Collection: Uzumaki Megavolume (NARUTO—ナルト— 総集編　うずまき大巻, Naruto Sōshūhen: Uzumaki Daikan). These collections have larger dimensions, preserve all illustrations in their original colour, and include other bonuses such as posters and interviews.

Sōshūhen #1
Japanese release
November 7, 2008 (ISBN 978-4-08-111001-8)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #1 to Naruto Chapter #33
Sōshūhen #2
Japanese release
November 21, 2008 (ISBN 978-4-08-111002-5)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #34 to Naruto Chapter #64
Sōshūhen #3
Japanese release
December 5, 2008 (ISBN 978-4-08-111003-2)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #65 to Naruto Chapter #97

Japanese release
December 19, 2008 (ISBN 978-4-08-111004-9)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #98 to Naruto Chapter #139
Sōshūhen #5
Japanese release
January 9, 2009 (ISBN 978-4-08-111005-6)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #140 to Naruto Chapter #171
Sōshūhen #6
Japanese release
February 13, 2009 (ISBN 978-4-08-111006-3)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #172 to Naruto Chapter #198
Sōshūhen #7
Japanese release
March 13, 2009 (ISBN 978-4-08-111007-0)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #199 to Naruto Chapter #217
Sōshūhen #8
Japanese release
April 10, 2009 (ISBN 978-4-08-111008-7)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #218 to Naruto Chapter #244

Shūeisha Jump Remix

The manga was re-released as a part of the Shūeisha Jump Remix and the Naruto Project. The volumes consist of a varying amount of chapters as well as some of the Konoha One Hundred Leaves Collections, short articles on a variety of subjects that were previously included in the databooks.

Title
Naruto First Legend: Formation!! Kakashi's Team 7 (NARUTO－ナルト－伝ノ一　結成!!カカシ第七班, Naruto Den no Ichi: Kessei!! Kakashi Dainana-han)
Japanese release
April 24, 2015 (ISBN 978-4-08-113438-0)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #1 to Naruto Chapter #33
Title
Naruto Second Legend: The Chūnin Exams 1 (NARUTO－ナルト－伝ノ二　中忍試験①, Naruto Den no Ni: Chūnin Shiken 1)
Japanese release
April 24, 2015 (ISBN 978-4-08-113439-7)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #34 to Naruto Chapter #64
Title
Naruto Third Legend: The Chūnin Exams 2 (NARUTO－ナルト－伝ノ三　中忍試験②, Naruto Den no San: Chūnin Shiken 2)
Japanese release
May 8, 2015 (ISBN 978-4-08-113442-7)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #65 to Naruto Chapter #90
Title
Naruto Fourth Legend: The Chūnin Exams 3 (NARUTO－ナルト－伝ノ四　中忍試験③, Naruto Den no Yon: Chūnin Shiken 3)

May 22, 2015 (ISBN 978-4-08-113443-4)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #91 to Naruto Chapter #115
Title
Naruto Fifth Legend: Konoha Crush (NARUTO－ナルト－伝ノ五　木ノ葉崩し, Naruto Den no Go: Konoha Kuzushi)

June 5, 2015 (ISBN 978-4-08-113450-2)
Contents
Naruto Chapter #116 to Naruto Chapter #145
Title
Naruto Sixth Legend: Clash! The Legendary Sannin (NARUTO－ナルト－伝ノ六　激突！伝説の三忍, Naruto Den no Roku: Gekitotsu! Densetsu no Sannin)
Japanese release
June 19, 2015 (ISBN 978-4-08-113451-9)
Contents
